description: Selected business direction from L1 discovery phase

direction.name: Content & Marketing Agency
direction.market: Small businesses and early-stage startups needing consistent content but lacking in-house writers
direction.positioning: AI-augmented content agency — faster turnaround, data-driven topic selection, human-quality output at freelancer prices
direction.revenueModel: Monthly retainer packages ($500-$2000/mo) with add-on services for campaigns
direction.differentiator: Combines AI content generation with human editorial oversight to deliver 3x the output of a solo freelancer
direction.targetCustomer: B2B SaaS founders and marketing managers at companies with 5-50 employees
risks: Race to bottom on pricing as AI tools commoditize content
Client retention depends on measurable results, not just output volume
Reputation risk if AI-generated content is detected and perceived negatively

alternatives.name: Niche Newsletter Business
alternatives.reason_rejected: Slower revenue ramp — requires audience building before monetization

alternatives.name: Technical Documentation Service
alternatives.reason_rejected: Smaller addressable market, higher skill barrier
